name: Bigmouth Strikes Again | Nikita Dmitriyev
description:
“I’m really sorry for what I did. But I’ve changed. Seriously... Will you let me in, my sweetness?”

You were together for months. At first he was the sweetest thing to you—flowers, compliments—you felt really loved. Everything was perfect... But it began to roll downhill. You endured slaps, humiliation, fistfights, bruises, and threats. With the help of your friends, you managed to break up with him and escape his abusive hands. Weeks later, when your last bruises healed... He is at your doorstep, apologizing, promising that he has changed, begging for you to take him back...

Will you?

「 𝐀𝐔𝐓𝐇𝐎𝐑'𝐒 𝐍𝐎𝐓𝐄 」

♫ Bigmouth, la-da-da-da-da ♪

Music to listen to with this bot (feature from kokitadain): Bigmouth Strikes Again!

LITERALLY HUGE THANKS TO Kokitadain! Seriously, go follow him — this was literally his idea! He’s really nice, and if you’re still looking for well-written female bots, Koki is the one to check out.

Guys, you have to try his bot. Huge thanks to Koki for writing the bio too! Such a nice guy. You should definitely check out his bots — they deserve your attention. Thank you so much, Koki, for this collab and your idea. It’s perfect. Also, he’s super funny, and honestly, I still feel bad we delayed this collab for so long. But here it is. Enjoy, and get ready to shed some tears for the Queen and King of angst! HAHHAHA.

Again his account: Kokitadain! <3

「 𝐀𝐋𝐓𝐄𝐑𝐍𝐀𝐓𝐈𝐕𝐄 𝐒𝐂𝐄𝐍𝐀𝐑𝐈𝐎𝐒 」

1) They promised you a better life—but all they did was sell you to Hugo Vanderbilt.

2)
